concerns.text: The Assumptions section contains a '[NEEDS CLARIFICATION]' marker: 'if a critical variable is missing, the analysis will be limited... and a [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] marker will be added'. A converged spec must not carry unresolved clarification markers; the condition for aborting or limiting scope must be defined as a verifiable rule (e.g., 'If <X> features are missing, abort with error E005').
